Class RedisKeyValueTemplateBean

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.repository.cdi.CdiBean<KeyValueOperations>
org.springframework.data.redis.repository.cdi.RedisKeyValueTemplateBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.enterprise.context.spi.Contextual<KeyValueOperations>, jakarta.enterprise.inject.spi.Bean<KeyValueOperations>, jakarta.enterprise.inject.spi.BeanAttributes<KeyValueOperations>, jakarta.enterprise.inject.spi.PassivationCapable
public class RedisKeyValueTemplateBean extends CdiBean<KeyValueOperations>
CdiBean to create RedisKeyValueTemplate instances.
Author:
Mark Paluch, Christoph Strobl
